name: Performance - Onboarding Session Throughput
description: Evaluates the system's ability to handle multiple onboarding sessions in parallel.
input: Simultaneous /start and /step requests for 50+ unique employee_ids.
output: Success/failure rates and response times for all sessions.
success_criteria: At least 95% of sessions complete without error
No significant degradation in response time as concurrency increases
error_scenarios: Session data loss or corruption under high load
